title: I Don't See You
description: Unique horror mod that interacts with the player in unexpected ways.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07522d041c5b6d446cfd2994700c241587b49aa2_0.webp)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
**"If you don't notice danger, there is no danger."**

"I DON'T SEE YOU" is a unique horror mod designed for players who are tired of "dweller" horror mods and prefer unsettling experiences like "The Broken Script".

This mod introduces a new hostile entity that interacts with the player in unexpected ways.

version 0.3.0 removed for a while due to crash bugs

MOD IS IN DEVELOPMENT STATE.

"I DON'T SEE YOU" is a **long play mod**, also play on easy or higher difficulty!

**MOD CAN DISABLE CREATIVE AND COMMAND INPUT.**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Recommended to play with serbernus's "PSX shader"

You can also download resourse packs like "Golden days"

Just make minecraft look as much as beta minecraft and its will be fire.
</details>


FAQ:

_1. Does it corrupt my world / damage my device?_
   
No it doesn't.
   
_2. Does it support multiplayer?_

Yes, but can broke some events or affect on frequency of events.

_3. How long does it take to make things happen?_

"I DON'T SEE YOU" is a long play mod so don't expect thing to happen fast.

_4. Can entity break my buildings?_

Yes, it can.
